notes:
#74 ExaminerAgent 配置管理切片完成。Backend: examiner_agent CRUD API + test suite（7 passed）；ruff check src/ All checks passed；alembic head 20260516_1200_066；collect 2139 tests；Frontend: examiner-agents page + tests（16 passed）；tsc/lint/build passed。进入 #75。
#75 AI 考官 WebSocket 运行时闭环完成。Backend: examiner runtime + websocket router + snapshot question refs + idempotent report path marker；target tests（22 passed）；ruff check src/ All checks passed；alembic head 20260516_1200_066。进入 #76。
#76 学员 AI 考核前端闭环完成。合约对齐：类型定义精确匹配 backend examiner_runtime.py（session.init/exam.question/exam.feedback/exam.completed 全部字段）。Hook 测试 15 passed（WebSocket mock、连接/答题/反馈/完成/可选字段/重连/超时/failed/voice/error）。路由级页面测试 21 passed（loading/disabled→即将上线/题库为空/connecting/reconnecting/failed retry/超时警告/语音降级/题目显示+提交/feedback+reason/completed all_answered+timed_out+reconnected+empty_question_bank/报告导航/评分面板进度/行内错误）。tsc --noEmit passed。eslint --quiet passed。npm run build passed（/exam/[sessionId] 路由已注册）。进入 #77。
#77 端到端验收、性能验证与 COO 交付包完成。Backend final gate evidence：7 passed；performance gates：3 passed；examiner backend target：27 passed；ruff check src/ All checks passed；alembic head 20260516_1200_066；collect 2159 tests。Frontend examiner tests：52 passed；tsc --noEmit passed；eslint --quiet passed；npm run build passed（/exam/[sessionId] 路由已注册）；route smoke /exam/exam-session-1 HTTP 200。交付文档：docs/delivery/sales-training-learning-examiner-final-gate.md。截图/GIF 因 Chrome DevTools MCP profile 占用未采集，建议 /qa-only 补视觉证据。
